productDisplayName: Maxima Men Black Dial Attivo Watch
description: Style Note Want to steal the show? Want to break off from the mundane? Want to set a trend? Want to stand out from the crowd? Now here's your chance to make an exclusive style statement with this Attivo watch from maxima - this is the time-piece you've been waiting for to class-up your accessory collection! Product DetailsCase style: Round stainless steel case Dial style: Black dial with silver and white indicies and hands Features: Date aperture at 4 hour mark Strap stype: Steel strap with butterfly clasp Water resistant to 3ATM, suitable for light rain or splashes Warranty: 1 Year Size: Case diameter: 45 mm Case thickness: 9 mm
